handoff.imaging_instruction: Query TCIA/NBIA by PatientID inside TCGA-Breast-Radiogenomics first, then use TCGA-BRCA as a fallback if no series are returned.
handoff.genomics_instruction: Query GDC by the same TCGA submitter IDs and export subtype, receptor status, survival fields, model features, and baseline risk scores.
handoff.preferred_imaging_artifact: .les segmentation masks when available, plus clean 3D numpy volumes for Vinesh
